// 01 — About Me

Who I Am

I'm Rahul Singh, a Master of Computer Applications (MCA) student at Dr. Ambedkar Institute of Technology, Bangalore. My journey spans backend development, AI-integrated applications, and an ever-growing interest in enterprise solutions like SAP.

I had the privilege of working with Guruvithya IT Services Pvt. Ltd. (IBM Collaboration), where I built a production-ready AI-powered video dubbing and translation platform — a project that sharpened my skills in AI pipelines, Agile workflows, and scalable media processing.

Beyond code, I'm a football enthusiast and a competitive sketcher — winner of an inter-school sketching competition. I believe creativity and analytical thinking go hand-in-hand.

🎯
Career Goal
Build a career in SAP & enterprise solutions, applying AI/ML thinking to business process optimization.
🤖
AI Enthusiast
Built AI platforms using Whisper, Gemini, RAG, LLMs and deployed them in a structured enterprise environment.
📊
Data-Driven Thinker
Proficient in SQL, Python, Power BI, and Excel for turning raw data into actionable business insights.
🏆
IBM Collaboration
Delivered a production-ready AI platform in a real enterprise environment mentored by IBM India Pvt. Ltd.

// 03 — Experience

Where I've Worked

AI Backend Developer Intern
Sep 2025 – Nov 2025
Guruvithya IT Services Pvt. Ltd. (IBM Collaboration) · Bangalore, India
  • Built an AI-powered video dubbing and translation platform using Flask, Whisper, Gemini, and Edge TTS.
  • Developed backend APIs for transcription, translation, and real-time voice processing.
  • Implemented media pipelines with FFmpeg and added multi-language support for 20+ languages.
  • Applied Agile methodology and optimized performance for scalable media processing.
  • Project certified by Dr. Ambedkar Institute of Technology with mentorship from IBM India Pvt. Ltd.
Web Development Intern

Academor · Remote

Audio & Video Translation System
